meta.title: ANOTE — Automated Medical Reports
meta.description: Transcribe patient conversations and generate structured medical reports with AI. Local and cloud transcription, GDPR compliant, Czech medical terminology.
meta.ogDescription: AI assistant for medical documentation. Local and cloud transcription, reports in seconds.

hero.description: Record. ANOTE transcribes and creates a structured medical report — right on your phone.

howItWorks.heading: How It Works
howItWorks.subheading: Three steps from recording to report

steps.title: Record
steps.description: Start recording during the examination. ANOTE captures the conversation right on your phone.

steps.title: Transcribe
steps.description: ANOTE transcribes speech to text — locally on device (Whisper) or via cloud (gpt-4o-transcribe). Transcription updates live.

steps.title: Generate Report
steps.description: AI creates a structured medical report with 13 sections following Czech standards. Done in seconds.

items.title: Two Transcription Modes
items.body: Local transcription (Whisper) runs on the phone — audio never leaves the device and works offline. Cloud transcription (gpt-4o-transcribe) is faster and more accurate, audio is sent for processing. Report generation always requires an internet connection.

items.title: Right Template for Every Examination
items.body: Outpatient exam, follow-up, gastroscopy, colonoscopy, ultrasound — each exam type has its own report structure. Or let AI detect the type automatically.

items.title: One Tap. No Retyping.
items.body: Tap record, talk to the patient, tap stop. Copy the report to clipboard or send via email — directly to your EHR system.

demoVideo.heading: See How ANOTE Works
demoVideo.subheading: 2 minutes that save hours of work

dialogue.speaker: doctor
dialogue.text: Hello, what brings you in today?

dialogue.speaker: patient
dialogue.text: Hello, doctor. I've been coughing for about five days, it's getting worse. I also get short of breath walking up stairs.

dialogue.speaker: patient
dialogue.text: Yes, 38.2 last night. This morning I measured 37.8.

dialogue.speaker: doctor
dialogue.text: Do you take any regular medications?

dialogue.speaker: patient
dialogue.text: Yes, Prestarium for blood pressure and Metformin for diabetes. Both for about three years.

dialogue.speaker: patient
dialogue.text: To penicillin — I get a rash.

reportSections.title: CC — Chief Complaint
reportSections.content: Patient reports 5 days of progressive productive cough. Dyspnea on exertion (walking up stairs). Febrile — 38.2 °C yesterday, 37.8 °C today. No hemoptysis, no chest pain.

reportSections.title: PMH — Past Medical History
reportSections.content: Arterial hypertension (3 years). Type 2 diabetes mellitus (3 years).

reportSections.title: Medications
reportSections.content: Prestarium (perindopril) — antihypertensive. Metformin — oral antidiabetic. Both for approximately 3 years.

reportSections.title: Adherence
reportSections.content: Patient cooperative, communicates clearly, answers questions.

reportSections.title: Physical Examination
reportSections.content: Examination performed. Details in clinical record.

reportSections.title: Assessment
reportSections.content: Suspected acute bronchitis, likely infectious etiology. Differential: community-acquired pneumonia.

reportSections.title: Proposed Investigations
reportSections.content: Chest X-ray PA. CBC + differential, CRP. O₂ saturation.

reportSections.title: Proposed Therapy & Instructions
reportSections.content: Amoxicillin + clavulanic acid (consider alternative — clarithromycin given penicillin allergy). Antipyretics as needed. Follow-up in 5 days or sooner if worsening.

visitTypes.heading: Exam Types
visitTypes.subheading: Each exam type has its own report structure

testimonials.heading: What Doctors Say

items.quote: Finally, I don't have to sit at the computer for an hour after clinic. ANOTE saves me at least 2 hours a day.
items.name: MUDr. [Name]

items.quote: I was surprised how accurately the AI understands Czech medical terminology. I barely need to edit the reports.
items.name: MUDr. [Name]

items.quote: GDPR compliance was key for us. No audio leaves the phone — we couldn't find that anywhere else.
items.name: MUDr. [Name]

testimonials.earlyAccessLabel: Be one of the first users

items.a: For medical dictation (single speaker, quiet room), accuracy is high. Local transcription uses Whisper optimized for Czech. Cloud transcription uses gpt-4o-transcribe for faster, more accurate results. The AI report generator can also interpret minor transcription errors.

items.q: Can I edit the report before sending?
items.a: Yes. The generated report is fully editable within the app. You can edit it, copy to clipboard, or send via email.

items.q: What exam types does the app support?
items.a: Outpatient exam, follow-up, gastroscopy, colonoscopy, and ultrasound. If you need a different type, we can build a custom template for you. You can also let AI automatically detect the exam type from the transcript.

items.q: Can I connect ANOTE to my hospital system?
items.a: ANOTE works independently of hospital systems — local transcription runs on the phone (Whisper, even offline) and the structured report is generated once the phone is online. You can then paste the report into your documentation or send it by email.
7-day free trial. Then a monthly subscription. Price to be announced.

items.q: Which devices does ANOTE run on?
items.a: iOS (iPhone) and Android. The app is optimized for modern smartphones with at least 2 GB RAM.

Yes. In local mode, audio stays on device. In cloud mode, audio is sent for processing and then deleted. Text data is processed exclusively in Azure West Europe. No data is stored or used to train models.

items.q: How long does report generation take?
items.a: Usually 5–15 seconds after recording ends. During recording, a live report preview updates every 15 seconds.

podminky.title: Terms of Service — ANOTE
podminky.description: Terms of service for the ANOTE application.
podminky.heading: Terms of Service

sections.heading: 1. Introduction
sections.content: These terms of service ("Terms") govern the use of the ANOTE application and related services. By using the application, you agree to these Terms.

sections.heading: 2. Service Description
sections.content: ANOTE is an application for transcribing medical conversations and generating structured medical reports using artificial intelligence. The application is intended exclusively as a tool to support medical documentation.

sections.heading: 3. Limitation of Liability
sections.content: All generated report content must be reviewed by a qualified physician before any clinical use. The operator is not liable for any inaccuracies in generated reports.

sections.heading: 4. Personal Data Protection
sections.content: Processing of personal data is governed by our Privacy Policy. In local mode, audio recordings are processed on the user's device. In cloud mode, they are sent for processing and then deleted.

sections.heading: 5. Payment Terms
sections.content: Speech-to-text transcription is free (runs on device). Report generation is charged according to the current price list. Payments are billed based on actual usage with no monthly subscription.

sections.heading: 6. Service Termination
sections.content: Users may stop using the service at any time. The operator reserves the right to limit or terminate access to the service in case of violation of these Terms.

sections.heading: 7. Governing Law
sections.content: These Terms are governed by the laws of the Czech Republic. Czech courts have jurisdiction for dispute resolution.

podminky.note: Full terms text will be added after legal review.

ochranaSoukromi.title: Privacy Policy — ANOTE
ochranaSoukromi.description: Privacy policy and personal data processing in the ANOTE application.
ochranaSoukromi.heading: Privacy Policy

sections.heading: 1. Data Controller
sections.content: The data controller is the operator of the ANOTE application (contact: anote-appka@outlook.com).

subsections.heading: 2.1 Contact Form
subsections.content: Name, email address, optionally phone number — for the purpose of handling your inquiry and providing access to the service.

subsections.heading: 2.2 Audio Recordings
subsections.content: In local mode, audio recordings never leave your device. Speech-to-text transcription runs locally on your phone using the Whisper model. In cloud mode, audio is sent for processing (gpt-4o-transcribe) and then deleted.

subsections.heading: 2.3 Text Transcripts
subsections.content: Anonymized text transcript is sent to Azure OpenAI server (West Europe region, EU) exclusively for generating a structured medical report. Data is not stored on servers and is not used for model training.

sections.heading: 3. Legal Basis
sections.content: We process personal data based on your consent (Art. 6(1)(a) GDPR) and legitimate interest in providing the service (Art. 6(1)(f) GDPR).

sections.heading: 4. Data Transfers
sections.content: Text data for report generation is processed exclusively within the EU (Azure West Europe). Data is not transferred to third countries outside the EU/EEA.

sections.heading: 5. Retention Period
sections.content: Contact data from the form is retained for the period necessary to process your request, maximum 12 months. Text transcripts are not retained on servers (zero retention policy).

sections.heading: 6. Your Rights
sections.content: You have the right to access, rectification, erasure, restriction of processing, data portability, and the right to lodge a complaint with the Office for Personal Data Protection (ÚOOÚ).

sections.heading: 7. Cookies
sections.content: The ANOTE website does not use tracking cookies. Analytics are handled using a privacy-friendly solution without cookies.

sections.heading: 8. Contact
sections.content: For privacy-related questions, contact us at anote-appka@outlook.com.

ochranaSoukromi.note: Full privacy policy text will be added after legal review.
